hero.subtitle: Organize, review, and learn at your pace with the SM-P model. A smart system that adapts to your memory for extraordinary results.

features.smpSubtitle: Our intelligent algorithm predicts when you're about to forget a concept and reminds you at the exact right time.

adaptive.title: Adaptive Algorithm
adaptive.desc: Analyzes your response speed and accuracy to adjust review intervals automatically.

spaced.title: Spaced Repetition
spaced.desc: Optimizes long-term memory through strategic session scheduling.

progress.title: Real Progress
progress.desc: Visualize how your retention improves with detailed charts and personalized goals.

features.modesSubtitle: Not every day is the same. Choose the mode that best fits your energy and time.

normal.title: General Mode
normal.desc: The fastest way to stay up to date. Combines all pending cards from all decks in one optimized session.

hard.title: Intensive Mode
hard.desc: Focus on the difficult stuff. Select specific decks and practice only the cards you struggle with most.

casual.title: Casual Mode
casual.desc: Stress-free study. Review any content without affecting statistics or the SM-P algorithm intervals.

custom.title: Individual Deck
custom.desc: Total control. Study a single deck respecting your daily limits for new cards and reviews.
